findings.issue: Textbook progressive disclosure — 89-line SKILL.md routing to 12 focused reference files
Persona context is load-bearing and efficient — ~30 lines establishing identity that directly shapes agent behavior
Clean intelligence placement — AI handles judgment, scripts handle deterministic validation
Outcome-driven capability prompts across all 10 references
Disciplined memory system with clear persistence strategies
Reference files are concise — most under 50 lines, focused on outcomes not procedures
Catchphrases serve as style anchors — not waste, but behavioral calibration for the LLM
Principles are decision frameworks, not platitudes — each resolves real ambiguity
i18n is naturally woven into communication style, not bolted on
Activation sequence is logically ordered with clear fallback chain
Scripts are well-scoped — glossary-coverage for data, validate-term-proposal for schema
Headless mode has distinct named tasks with clear outputs
Overview quality appropriate for companion-interactive skill type
Learning path templates (lines 24-62 in learning-paths.md) are static curriculum data that could be extracted if curriculum grows
findings.fix: Monitor — extract to assets/ if templates exceed 100 lines

findings.issue: Capabilities table lacks routing criteria — brief descriptions would help disambiguation
findings.fix: Add brief capability descriptions to help agent disambiguate user intent without loading all reference files

findings.issue: Glossary data discovery logic lives only in SKILL.md On Activation — context compaction risk
findings.fix: Consider extracting data-loading logic to a script if compaction becomes an issue

findings.issue: Quiz examples are large but load-bearing few-shot guidance
findings.fix: Monitor if quiz-mode.md file grows — consider extracting examples to assets/

findings.issue: Mild overlap between frontmatter description and Overview — acceptable for companion agents
Name 'kuka' doesn't follow bmad-agent-{name} — expected for standalone community plugin
{project-root} used for .kuka/ sidecar — intentional for non-BMad plugin
TS scripts use npx tsx without version pinning — acceptable for project-local execution

summary.assessment: 89 lines, overview quality appropriate, progressive disclosure good, persona context appropriate. Top improvement: add brief capability descriptions to Capabilities routing table.
